services.title: Panel & Breaker Service
services.description: Fixing tripped breakers and upgrading electrical panels. Same day response when your power's acting up.

services.title: Kitchen & Dining Renovations
services.description: Moving outlets, installing new lighting, and rewiring for modern kitchens. We handle the big jobs.

services.title: New Light Installation
services.description: From single fixtures to fifty new lights — we plan, wire, and install every connection properly.

services.title: Outlet Installation & Moving
services.description: Adding outlets where you need them and relocating existing ones for your home updates.

about.heading: Chattanooga electricians who show up when we say we will
about.body: Triple E Electric serves Chattanooga homeowners with honest electrical work and same-day service. Whether it's a kitchen renovation with fifty new lights or emergency panel repairs, we handle every job with the same attention to detail. Licensed, insured, and ready to wire your home right.

reviews.name: Billy H.
reviews.text: Kitchen and dining room renovation with wall demo, fifty new lights, and outlet moves. Big job but they knocked it out of the park and communicated every step.

reviews.name: Sean R.
reviews.text: Breaker panel repair same day I called. Quick fix, professional crew, and the boss trusted me to pay later. Outstanding service.

service_areas.heading: Serving Chattanooga and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Licensed electrical service throughout Hamilton County

cta.heading: Ready to get your electrical work done right?
cta.body: Same day service, licensed electricians, and we answer our phone. Get your free estimate today.
